'''sonaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wreathen|wreathen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wreathen|wreathen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sonaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sonarithi|sonarithi]] || [[word:sonariji|sonariji]] || [[word:sonarishi|sonarishi]] || [[word:sonariki|sonariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sonaruthuthu|sonaruthuthu]] || [[word:sonarujuju|sonarujuju]] || [[word:sonarushushu|sonarushushu]] || [[word:sonarukuku|sonarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sonaruthu|sonaruthu]] || [[word:sonaruju|sonaruju]] || [[word:sonarushu|sonarushu]] || [[word:sonaruku|sonaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sonarufthuf|sonarufthuf]] || [[word:sonarufjuf|sonarufjuf]] || [[word:sonarufshuf|sonarufshuf]] || [[word:sonarufkuf|sonarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sonarethe|sonarethe]] || [[word:sonareje|sonareje]] || [[word:sonareshe|sonareshe]] || [[word:sonareke|sonareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sonarothotho|sonarothotho]] || [[word:sonarojojo|sonarojojo]] || [[word:sonaroshosho|sonaroshosho]] || [[word:sonarokoko|sonarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sonarotho|sonarotho]] || [[word:sonarojo|sonarojo]] || [[word:sonarosho|sonarosho]] || [[word:sonaroko|sonaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sonarofthof|sonarofthof]] || [[word:sonarofjof|sonarofjof]] || [[word:sonarofshof|sonarofshof]] || [[word:sonarofkof|sonarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfthÃŸf|sonarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfjÃŸf|sonarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfshÃŸf|sonarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfkÃŸf|sonarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|sonarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|sonarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|sonarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|sonarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfthÃŸf|sonarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfjÃŸf|sonarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfshÃŸf|sonarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfkÃŸf|sonarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfthÃŸf|sonarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfjÃŸf|sonarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfshÃŸf|sonarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sonarÃŸfkÃŸf|sonarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sonarÃḊthÃḊ|sonarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:sonarÃḊjÃḊ|sonarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:sonarÃḊshÃḊ|sonarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:sonarÃḊkÃḊ|sonarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sonarathatha|sonarathatha]] || [[word:sonarajaja|sonarajaja]] || [[word:sonarashasha|sonarashasha]] || [[word:sonarakaka|sonarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sonaratha|sonaratha]] || [[word:sonaraja|sonaraja]] || [[word:sonarasha|sonarasha]] || [[word:sonaraka|sonaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sonarafthaf|sonarafthaf]] || [[word:sonarafjaf|sonarafjaf]] || [[word:sonarafshaf|sonarafshaf]] || [[word:sonarafkaf|sonarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sonarasha|sonarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sonarshÃḋsha|sonarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sonarosha|sonarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sonarmusha|sonarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sonaryasha|sonaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosonarnkshÃḋsha|gosonarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosonarnkrosha|gosonarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosonarnkmusha|gosonarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosonarnkyasha|gosonarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sonanarasha|sonanarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sonanarshÃḋsha|sonanarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sonanarosha|sonanarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sonanarmusha|sonanarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sonanaryasha|sonanaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosonanarnkshÃḋsha|gosonanarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosonanarnkrosha|gosonanarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosonanarnkmusha|gosonanarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosonanarnkyasha|gosonanarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:senÃḊrasha|senÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:senÃḊrshÃḋsha|senÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:senÃḊrosha|senÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:senÃḊrmusha|senÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:senÃḊryasha|senÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosenÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gosenÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosenÃḊrnkrosha|gosenÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosenÃḊrnkmusha|gosenÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosenÃḊrnkyasha|gosenÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sonfarasha|sonfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sonfarshÃḋsha|sonfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sonfarosha|sonfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sonfarmusha|sonfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sonfaryasha|sonfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosonfarnkshÃḋsha|gosonfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosonfarnkrosha|gosonfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosonfarnkmusha|gosonfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosonfarnkyasha|gosonfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
